summary: Comprehensive testing of Credits, Messages, and Notifications features completed. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly including Stripe checkout redirect.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test accounts. Messages sent between surfer and photographer during API testing created notifications for photographer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credits, Messages, and Notifications features fully tested and working. Stripe checkout successfully redirects to Stripe in sandbox mode. Test accounts have messages and notifications.

verified_features.credits_page_4_packages: PASS - $10, $25, $50, $100 packages with bonus on $50 (+5 FREE) and $100 (+15 FREE)
verified_features.credits_custom_amount_input: PASS - Input works and purchase button updates dynamically
verified_features.credits_stripe_checkout: PASS - Clicking purchase redirects to Stripe checkout with correct amount
verified_features.messages_primary_requests_tabs: PASS - Both Primary and Requests tabs visible and functional
verified_features.messages_conversation_list: PASS - Shows user name and message preview in conversation list
verified_features.messages_conversation_detail: PASS - Clicking conversation shows messages with timestamps
verified_features.messages_send_message: PASS - Message input and send button visible and functional
verified_features.notifications_list: PASS - Displays notifications with type icon, title, body, timestamp
verified_features.notifications_unread_count: PASS - Shows '1 unread' when photographer has unread notifications
verified_features.notifications_mark_all_read: PASS - Button works and shows success toast
verified_features.navigation_sidebar_notifications: PASS - Notifications link in sidebar navigates to /notifications
verified_features.navigation_topnav_bell_icon: PASS - Bell icon in mobile top nav has red dot indicator and navigates to /notifications
